Lady Lake Restaurant Health Grades

64%Grade A
4.2Avg rating
11Restaurants

Every one of the 11 restaurants in Lady Lake on this page carries an A–F health grade built from its latest Florida DBPR inspection. 7 hold an A, and the typical diner rating runs 4.2 stars. The list runs best grade first.

Lady Lake restaurant health grades — FAQ

How are Lady Lake restaurant health grades calculated?

Florida issues no official grades, so we calculate an A–F score from each restaurant's most recent DBPR inspection — starting at 100 points and deducting for high-priority, intermediate, and basic violations. Of the 11 Lady Lake restaurants we grade, 7 currently hold an A.

Does Florida assign letter grades to Lady Lake restaurants?

No. The Florida Department of Business and Professional Regulation (DBPR) inspects restaurants and records violations but does not grade them. The grades shown here are calculated by us from those public inspection records.

How many restaurants are graded in Lady Lake?

We currently publish 11 graded restaurants in Lady Lake, with an average diner rating of 4.2 stars; 7 hold an A health grade.

See the full scoring method on our methodology page.
